subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Thy name hath been mentioned in the Most Holy Court, wherefore this most glorious Tablet hath descended from the heaven of the All-Merciful's loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز حق اسمت در ساحت اقدس مذکور لذا این لوح امنع از سماء رحمت رحمانی نازل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
